name: Image to Ascii Art converter
description: The ASCII Art Converter is a simple tool that transforms images into text-based art using ASCII characters. You can easily copy the grayscale ASCII output as plain text, or download the result as a PNG image—either in grayscale or in full color.
imageAltName: Animated GIF showing my music visualizer application in action

name: Music Visualiser
summary: A simple music Visualiser using Raylib
description: A music visualiser made in C++ using the Raylib library. It implements basic functionalities such as play, pause and seek. You can also select mulitple files to play the songs in a queue.
imageAltName: Animated GIF showing my music visualizer application in action

name: Webpage Scraper
summary: A Property details aggregator using Playwright
description: A scraper application to scrape property details and aggregate all the information for easier data analysis. Built for a client.

name: ButterCup Tide
summary: Tide login for a open source password manager
description: Tide.org developed a new and secure way for identity management on the internet. As a group of 3, my team implemented this technology in an open source password manager called Buttercup Tide for our internship program.

name: Interview Transcription
description: Created the backend for an AI powered transcription service using Microsoft Azure AI speech service for a client. The application listens to an interview, converts the speech to text recognising the speaker. Built for a client.
technologies: Node.js, Azure AI Speech Service, Javascript, Microsoft Power apps

name: Games
description: These games were made using Unity and Godot. All of them were made for various game jams and then abandoned afterwards. You can check them out in my itch.io page.
technologies: Unity, aseprite, inkscape, sfxr, bfxr, audacity
imageAltName: Animated GIF showing various games created by me
